name: Fitness Flexed Biceps
desc: The ultimate symbol for physical strength and fitness progress. Used globally to represent muscle building, gym motivation, and the 'no pain, no gain' mindset.

name: Fitness Weightlifter
desc: Represents strength training and bodybuilding. High SEO value for powerlifting content, gym equipment sales, and daily workout routines.

name: Fitness Runner
desc: The primary icon for cardio fitness and track sports. Perfect for marathon training, morning jogs, and aerobic exercise topics.

name: Fitness Yoga Pose
desc: Symbolizes flexibility and mental fitness. Essential for yoga studios, pilates classes, and holistic wellness content.

name: Fitness Cyclist
desc: Represents outdoor cycling or indoor spin classes. Great for endurance training, bike gear reviews, and eco-friendly fitness.

name: Fitness Cartwheel
desc: Indicates gymnastics, agility, and mobility training. Used to highlight core strength and athletic versatility.

name: Fitness Swimmer
desc: Represents full-body fitness through swimming. Targeted at aquatic sports, triathlon prep, and low-impact exercise options.

name: Fitness Boxing Glove
desc: Symbolizes combat fitness, HIIT workouts, and boxing gyms. Used for high-intensity training and stress-relief exercise content.

name: Fitness Nutrition Meal
desc: Represents the nutrition side of fitness. Ideal for meal prepping, keto/vegan diets, and post-workout fuel discussions.

name: Fitness Protein Shake
desc: The icon for pre-workout and protein supplementation. Popular in the fitness community for showing supplement routines and hydration.

name: Fitness Smartwatch
desc: Represents tracking steps, heart rate, and workout data. Essential for tech-focused fitness and wearables marketing.

name: Fitness Achievement Trophy
desc: Symbolizes winning a fitness challenge or sports competition. Used for client transformations and bodybuilding show wins.
